name: prompt-polish
description: Turn a rough question into high-performing bilingual, ready-to-paste LLM prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Rewrite rough questions into stronger bilingual LLM prompts
interface.longDescription: Prompt Polish detects the task type, applies a matching set of text-only prompt-engineering strategies, and returns one code block containing an English prompt and a Chinese prompt.
defaultPrompt: Rewrite this question for a better LLM answer.
